1.premise: A man with no arms steals a wallet using his feet, then has the audacity to set terms.
Missing arms could be toes functioning like fingers.

2.premise: Using arms and legs could be cheating against an armless thief.

3.premise: Snitching is widely understood as dangerous on a long bus ride but rarely admitted aloud.

1.premise: Carrying a gun on Greyhound could be obvious self-defense.
A Velcro wallet could be audible proof of an attempt to pay.

lines.text: - What's up?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Guys, I hate the Greyhound.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm so glad I don't gonna take the Greyhound no more.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: One time a nigga with no arms stole my wallet.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I'll say it again.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: A nigga with no arms stole my wallet.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: And the only reason why I called him
lines.label: setup

lines.text: because my wallet was in my hoodie
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 'cause it was cold out and I felt that nigga
lines.label: setup

lines.text: big toe scrape across my tummy.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: And then while I woke, that shit was right there
lines.label: setup

lines.text: in between his thumb toe, I don't know what you call it,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: but his thumb toe and his index toe
lines.label: setup

lines.text: was gripping that motherfucker.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: And he got strong legs, he got nice legs
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 'cause you know how like Daredevil, his eyes don't work,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: so his ears is stronger, so his arms is his legs.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: So when I tried to grab that shit, I had to like, tug a--
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You know, I had to tug a war with this nigga.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Then I started wrestling my wallet away.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: He talk about, "You cheating, you cheating,"
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: 'cause I had to use my arms and my legs...
lines.label: tag

lines.text: to get it away.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: It's just when I finally got it,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I stood up with my wallet, and he stood up with me,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: but he was wearing a hoodie, too,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: with no arms. His arms was dangling.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: So when he stood up, he was like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "What are you gonna do? Snitch?"
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I was like, "No, nigga, we still got eight hours on this bus.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I can't snitch."
lines.label: tag

lines.text: How dare you? 'Cause the other thing is,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: when I ride the Greyhound, I got my gun on me,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and they tell you, "You can't ride with your gun.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You won't get in trouble. Go to court.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Go to court." If you tell judges, like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Why'd you have your gun?" I was like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "I want a Greyhound," and I got all of my teeth.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: They'll be like, "Aquit it every single time."
lines.label: tag

lines.text: 'Cause if I had woken up,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and that nigga had stole my wallet with my gun,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: ain't nobody going--
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Ain't nobody going nowhere until I find my Transformers Velcro wallet.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I got a Velcro wallet because I want people to hear me at least try to pay for something.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Everybody within H and T and V, when you hear that shh, you're like, "He did his best that he could."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: That's my time, y'all. I love y'all.
lines.label: fluff
